prompt: Build a community page for Reveal.
method: constitution-bound expand simulation (same packs/contracts/evidence as forge expand-node; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)

nodes.label: Inviting empty home
nodes.details: Empty state must feel like a calm invitation into belonging, not a broken page with missing feed content.
nodes.strategicAnswer: The community page is the first home. Empty state should feel inviting, not broken.

nodes.label: Shame-free join path
nodes.details: First-run interaction: what she sees, taps, and feels before any money talk — privacy and no-shame copy at every step.

nodes.label: Belonging before tips
nodes.details: Visual hierarchy puts people and quiet presence above budgeting tips or tool chrome.

nodes.label: Public activity risk UX
nodes.details: Trust fails if activity feels too public — need clear visibility controls before she posts.

nodes.label: Quiet reply feedback
nodes.details: When answered, success state should feel received without toast spam; silence remains an option.
nodes.strategicAnswer: Prefer quiet belonging over engagement spam.

nodes.label: Calm loading recovery
nodes.details: Loading and error states stay mobile-first and emotionally steady — never shame or urgency language.
